niche: WorthScan student textbook bundle resale valuation

source_inputs.label: Operator brief
source_inputs.value: Create a WorthScan post for a bundle of used textbooks and course materials.

source_inputs.label: Valuation method
source_inputs.value: Check edition, ISBN, course relevance, access-code status, bundle completeness, writing/highlights, and three student resale comps.

source_inputs.label: Research boundary
source_inputs.value: Manual reviewed examples only. Do not scrape bookstores, campus marketplaces, or social platforms.

trend_examples.hook: The edition can kill the resale value
trend_examples.notes: Specific course-material detail creates immediate utility.

trend_examples.hook: Ask this before buying a textbook bundle
trend_examples.notes: Question hook supports a checklist structure.

trend_examples.hook: No access code means a different price
trend_examples.notes: Missing component reveal gives the final range context.

notes: No scraping, provider calls, or social publishing.

slides.on_screen_text: Scan this textbook bundle before you buy
slides.visual_direction: Show bundle photo, asking price, course name if approved, and edition.

slides.on_screen_text: Check ISBN, edition, course, and access code
slides.visual_direction: Crop ISBN, edition, access-code note, and included materials.
Show comp cards with edition, condition, and access-code status.

slides.on_screen_text: Subtract old edition, writing, and missing code
Worth range: buy, negotiate, or skip
slides.visual_direction: Show final range, confidence, and comment prompt.

output_requirements.caption: Textbook bundle deal or outdated edition? Comment "scan" with the next listing. WorthScan is a resale estimate, not a guarantee.
output_requirements.spoken_script: For textbook bundles, edition and access-code status can change the whole answer. Check ISBN, course relevance, condition, included materials, and three student resale comps before calling the range.
posting_notes: Do not include student names, schedules, or private seller details.
Do not imply official bookstore pricing.
Keep the range and disclaimer visible.

qa_notes: Course relevance must be manually verified.
No scraping or hidden endpoint use.
